rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §8.008, which governs political activity rules for regional education service centers.
quote: A regional education service center and each center employee is subject to Chapter 556, Government Code, and for purposes of that chapter:
_note: No conflict; rule text concerns political activities of regional education service centers, unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
